revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月廿二]][[zh:二月廿二]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 22|qq=February 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-shōhō|en|Tenpyō-shōhō|qid=Q1373169|lt=Tenpyō Shōhō|1=Tenpyō-shōhō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|749|en|749|qid=Q23624|lt=749|1=749}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – Gold first produced in {{ill|Mutsu Province|en|Mutsu Province|qid=Q907389|lt=Mutsu Province|1=Mutsu Province}} was presented to Japan. * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|qid=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku|1=Chōtoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|995|en|995|qid=Q23794|lt=995|1=995}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku|1=Shōryaku}} to {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|qid=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku|1=Chōtoku}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 13rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1585|en|1585|qid=Q6736|lt=1585|1=1585}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – The official audience of the 【Tenshō Mission to Europe】 was held when the young emissaries were received by Pope {{ill|Gregory XIII|ja|グレゴリウス13世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregory XIII|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to グレゴリウス13世 (ローマ教皇)|1=Pope Gregory XIII|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q83029}}. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|April 8|en|April 8|qid=Q2503|lt=April 8|1=April 8}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} declared the territories of the Matsumae Domain’s castle area to be under direct control, extending its jurisdiction over all of 【Ezo】. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|qid=Q2504|lt=April 9|1=April 9}}) – In Kyoto, the incident known as the {{ill|Ashikaga Sanda Kizō Kyōshū Jiken|ja|足利三代木像梟首事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sanda Kizō Kyōshū Jiken|1=Q10542766|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10542766}} occurred. == Births == * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|qid=Q2510|lt=April 1|1=April 1}}) – {{ill|Katō Tomosaburō|en|Katō Tomosaburō|qid=Q335203|lt=Katō Yūzaburō|1=Katō Tomosaburō}}, the 21st Prime Minister of Japan and admiral in the Imperial Japanese Navy (died {{ill|1923|en|1923|qid=Q2169|lt=1923|1=1923}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|qid=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}} 30th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|622|en|622|qid=Q23876|lt=622|1=622}} {{ill|April 8|en|April 8|qid=Q2503|lt=April 8|1=April 8}}) – {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|en|Prince Shōtoku|qid=Q263972|lt=Prince Shōtoku|1=Prince Shōtoku}}, a member of the imperial family and regent for Empress Suiko (born {{ill|574|en|574|qid=Q32597|lt=574|1=574}}). * {{ill|En'ō|en|En'ō|qid=Q1193942|lt=En'ō|1=En'ō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1239|en|1239|qid=Q5434|lt=1239|1=1239}} {{ill|March 28|en|March 28|qid=Q2458|lt=March 28|1=March 28}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Toba|en|Emperor Go-Toba|qid=Q316658|lt=Emperor Go-Toba|1=Emperor Go-Toba}}, the 82nd Emperor of Japan and a retired emperor (born {{ill|1180|en|1180|qid=Q19702|lt=1180|1=1180}}). * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1685|en|1685|qid=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|qid=Q2456|lt=March 26|1=March 26}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sai|en|Emperor Go-Sai|qid=Q349414|lt=Emperor Gosei|1=Emperor Go-Sai}}, the 111th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1637|en|1637|qid=Q6889|lt=1637|1=1637}}). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Taishi-kai|ja|太子会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi-kai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖徳太子|1=Prince Shōtoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q263972}} – A memorial service held in honor of Prince Shōtoku’s virtuous legacy.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|21|2|23|1|22|3|2|0222|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ar:February 22 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月廿二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月廿二]] {{wikidata link|Q838887}} [[Category:Days 22 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar February]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
